summary: Closed the remaining terminal closeout drift by making the ultimatum branch rewrite canonical round evidence and by constraining all PM-003 writers to the same four-counter schema.
highlights: Final-round ultimatum now updates roundResult markdown/self-check/compliance/fix state and rewrites canonical round evidence files.
Cycle PM-003 no longer carries non-canonical extra fields.
Cycle review_issue_count now uses the board-aligned recognized-severity filter.
